prestazioni: Engine: LS1 (Gen III, 5.7L, 346ci) – Full forged internals with Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (2618 alloy, 9.5:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods (6.125" length), and a Callies Compstar crankshaft (4.000" stroke) for a 408ci stroker build. Paired with a custom camshaft from Cam Motion (232/238 duration @ 0.050", 0.624"/0.624" lift, 114° LSA) and PAC Racing valve springs (150 lbs seat, 400 lbs open) for 7,500 RPM capability.

Forced Induction: Single Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger (88mm compressor, 1.06 A/R turbine housing) with a custom Precision Turbo & Engine 46mm wastegate and Tial MV-R 50mm blow-off valve. Supporting mods include a custom 4" aluminum intercooler piping system from Pro Alloy Motorsports, a PWR 4-core intercooler (1,200hp capacity), and a Bosch 044 fuel pump with dual Walbro 450LPH in-tank pumps, regulated by an Aeromotive A1000 fuel pressure regulator.

Drivetrain & Handling: Tremec TR-6060 6-speed manual transmission with a Spec Stage 4+ twin-disc clutch (26-spline, 10.5" diameter) and a billet flywheel. Rear differential upgraded to a Harrop 9" LSD with 3.73:1 gears and Strange Engineering 35-spline axles. Suspension features Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (2-way adjustable damping) with polyurethane bushings from SuperPro, and a Whiteline front sway bar (24mm adjustable) paired with a Hotchkis rear sway bar (22mm). Braking system includes AP Racing 6-piston calipers (380mm rotors front) and 4-piston calipers (355mm rotors rear) with Ferodo DS2500 pads.
estetica: Body Kit: Custom widebody conversion using a modified Rocket Bunny V2 Monaro kit (extended fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser) with carbon fiber overfenders (1.5" wider front, 2" wider rear) from Seibon Carbon. Rear spoiler replaced with a custom carbon fiber GT wing from APR Performance (adjustable angle, 65" span).

Wheels & Stance: Work Meister S1 3P wheels (19x10 +15 front, 19x12 +25 rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/35/19 front, 315/30/19 rear). Custom wheel spacers (15mm front, 25mm rear) from H&R for aggressive flush fitment. Fender rolling and pull performed with a Proform fender roller for clearance.

Interior & Details: Full custom interior with Recaro SPG XL seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved) wrapped in Alcantara and red Nappa leather (custom stitching by Katzkin). Dash and door cards reupholstered in matching Alcantara with carbon fiber trim from VCarbon. Engine bay detailed with a custom aluminum radiator support from Pro Alloy Motorsports, carbon fiber intake manifold cover (LSX-style), and a custom stainless steel exhaust system with Burns Stainless 3" mandrel-bent tubing and dual 4" titanium tips from Tomei.
